macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Global markets pressured by fresh tariff headlines and weak U.S. jobs data
items.summary: Markets were broadly risk-off as new tariff announcements and a weak U.S. jobs report weighed on sentiment, with Asian shares falling and U.S. futures slipping. Seeking Alpha also noted European indexes starting the week higher after an earlier sell-off, but the broader tone remained cautious.

items.title: Central banks in focus as BOJ defends recent rate hike and inflation stays mixed in major economies
items.summary: Seeking Alpha highlighted the Bank of Japan defending its recent rate hike to 1% amid continued inflation developments, including Japan’s inflation at 1.5% and core CPI at 1.4%. Other macro updates included eurozone inflation holding at 2% and multiple PMI readings signaling mixed manufacturing conditions across Europe and Asia.

items.title: U.S. index futures point to a softer open as oil falls
items.summary: Yahoo Finance’s market calendar showed S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq, and Russell 2000 futures all lower, alongside a drop in crude oil prices. That combination suggests a cautious start for U.S. equities, with energy easing some inflation pressure.

items.title: RBI minutes flag policy caution amid geopolitical and inflation concerns
items.summary: Economic Times reported that Reserve Bank of India MPC minutes showed policymakers paused rates amid West Asia uncertainty and fears of a policy misstep. The minutes also cited import dependence, Gulf remittances, El Nino risks, and concerns that energy prices may not return to pre-conflict levels.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto markets see about $178M in 24-hour liquidations, with shorts hit hardest
items.summary: Coinglass data cited in recent reporting shows roughly $178M in total crypto liquidations over the past 24 hours, with short positions accounting for the larger share. The move suggests a sharp intraday swing that squeezed bearish bets across the market.

items.title: Bitcoin trades around $64,193, up 0.87% over 24 hours
items.summary: Binance’s price page shows Bitcoin at about $64,193, reflecting a 0.87% gain over the last 24 hours. The same source notes that the broader crypto market has been sensitive to media coverage and regulatory developments.

items.title: Ethereum Classic posts a small 24-hour decline on Coinbase
items.summary: Coinbase lists Ethereum Classic at about €6.47, down roughly 3% from 24 hours earlier. That points to a modest move rather than a major market shock in ETC specifically.

items.title: Philippine SEC says it is ready for tokenized assets, signaling progress on real-world asset adoption
items.summary: Coinpedia reports that the Philippine SEC is ready for tokenized assets, which would open the door for broader real-world asset tokenization in the country. This is a notable regulatory-development story rather than a price event.

items.title: EU reportedly moves toward tighter crypto rules, including a €10K cash limit and anonymous-account ban
items.summary: Coinpedia says the EU is preparing to impose a €10,000 cash limit and ban anonymous crypto accounts as part of its regulatory tightening. If implemented, the measures would be among the stricter recent European compliance steps affecting crypto users and service providers.

items.title: Illinois signs a stricter digital asset tax law
items.summary: Recent crypto market coverage references Illinois enacting the strictest digital asset tax law in the United States. The development is significant because it adds another U.S. state-level regulatory burden for crypto activity.

items.title: Pi Network warns node operators to upgrade or lose network connection
items.summary: Coinpedia reports that Pi Network has warned node operators to upgrade their software to avoid losing network connectivity. This is a notable project-maintenance update that could affect validator and node participation.

items.title: WazirX offers 85% of stolen user funds after rebalancing plan
items.summary: Coinpedia reports that WazirX has completed rebalancing and is offering users access to 85% of stolen funds if creditors approve the plan. The development is important for victims of the exchange hack and for the platform’s recovery process.

items.title: Seismic raises $7M to build encrypted blockchain infrastructure
items.summary: Coinbase’s news feed highlights a $7 million funding round led by a16z crypto for Seismic, an encrypted blockchain developer focused on app-level privacy. The project aims to go beyond wallet-level encryption by obscuring user balances and identities at the application layer.

items.title: Bitwise makes first DeFi allocation through Maple Finance partnership
items.summary: Coinbase’s recent story feed says Bitwise, a crypto asset manager and ETF provider, has deployed capital into DeFi for the first time via Maple Finance. The move is notable because it signals continued institutional experimentation with on-chain credit markets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
